snapshots.notes: Initial snapshot, hand-copied from Python-Model-OT-Control v1.1.0 _vendored_models/swat/. Regression target for issue #4 — V_h was anti-anabolic. Superseded by the V_h-anabolic structural fix below.

V_h-anabolic structural fix. V_h removed from u_W and routed through the entrainment-amplitude factor. Three new parameters (lambda_amp_W=5, lambda_amp_Z=8, V_n_scale=2). V_c_max=3-hour clinical threshold for phase pathology. The earlier 'Option C / Option D' label is now redundant — there is one SWAT, this one. Auto-tagged option-d-validated-20260428-6ad6acb by the validation CI.

Initial snapshot, hand-copied from Python-Model-OT-Control PR #7 (feature/fsa-adapter, v1.2.1). Source: version_1/_vendored_models/fsa_high_res/. The mu_0 = +0.02 deviation from v4.1 spec mu_0 = -0.3 is deliberate (deployed value tuned for the 14-day POC horizon). FIM rank 10/10 cond 1.69e+05 PASS; Lyapunov 5/5 corners PASS. Status pending validation tag once CI runs.
